story.i_want: Implement conversation accumulation pattern for retry logic when Devin session resumption is not viable
story.so_that: Failed verification steps can be retried with full conversation context, allowing agents to see and fix previous errors

related_acceptance_criteria.criterion: Each retry creates a new Devin agent (no session resumption)
related_acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a retry attempt, When the orchestrator executes the step, Then a new Devin agent is created (not resuming a previous session)

related_acceptance_criteria.criterion: Retry limit enforced via existing traversal limit mechanism
related_acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a step with retry attempts, When the traversal limit is reached, Then no further retries are attempted

related_acceptance_criteria.criterion: Existing saga execution flow preserved (no breaking changes)
related_acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given existing sagas, When executed with new code, Then they continue to work without modification

related_edge_cases.criterion: Multiple retries with growing prompt size
related_edge_cases.gherkin: Given 5+ retry attempts, When accumulated prompt is composed, Then all previous outputs and verification feedback are included

steps.description: Modify SagaExecutor._execute_step() to detect retries by checking for existing attempt directories in node directory
Implement retry detection logic to call _determine_attempt_number() when retries are detected
Modify SagaExecutor._execute_step() to call Orchestrator.compose_retry_prompt() when retry is detected
Modify SagaExecutor._execute_node() to pass saga_id, node_name, and attempt_number to Orchestrator.invoke_step()
Add logging for retry detection and accumulated prompt composition in SagaExecutor
Verify that existing traversal limit mechanism enforces retry limits correctly
Write unit tests for retry detection logic
Write unit tests for _execute_step() with retry scenarios
Write integration tests for full retry flow with multiple attempts
Write integration tests for traversal limit enforcement on retries
Write E2E tests for saga with verification failure and successful retry

code: orchestrator/saga_executor.py - TraversalTracker for understanding traversal limit enforcement
orchestrator/tests/test_saga_executor.py - Existing saga executor tests for reference
